recent_basis: Recent mover lists use custom rating changes versus the 2026-03-27 snapshot, which is the day before the weighted-median 10th most recent team game. Skater movers use overall talent score, team movers use total team score, goalie movers use goalie score, and usage lists compare the most recent 10 games to the previous 10.

today_games.top_deciding_factors: deployment context edge (+0.570); recent talent trend edge (+0.215); goalie recent shots faced edge (3GP) (+0.213); trailing-team urgency edge (playoff series) (-0.153); goalie recent starts edge (7d) (+0.132)
today_games.home_factor_pushes: deployment context edge (+0.570); recent talent trend edge (+0.215); goalie recent shots faced edge (3GP) (+0.213); goalie recent starts edge (7d) (+0.132); high-danger suppression edge (+0.121)
today_games.away_factor_pushes: trailing-team urgency edge (playoff series) (-0.153); team delta-V offensive depth-score edge (-0.123); readiness edge (-0.106); depth-under-injury edge (-0.087); special-teams RAPM edge (-0.067)
